88968a50-517c-4bc4-8a8d-330a8c266365.issue_description: How do I add another mesh node?
88968a50-517c-4bc4-8a8d-330a8c266365.latest_question: Have you already powered on the secondary node, and if so, what is the current status of its LED indicator?
probable_causes: User is unfamiliar with the procedure for adding a secondary mesh node to the Moss Router X1 system.
88968a50-517c-4bc4-8a8d-330a8c266365.next_step: Follow the wireless node pairing procedure outlined in the product documentation.
88968a50-517c-4bc4-8a8d-330a8c266365.recommended_action: To add a secondary node, first place it in the same room as the main Moss Router X1, within 5-10 feet. Power on the secondary node and wait for its LED to turn solid amber, then pulse amber slowly. In the mobile app, tap 'Add Mesh Node'. Press the sync button on the back of the main router for 3 seconds until its LED pulses blue. Next, press the sync button on the secondary node. The nodes will pair, and the secondary node LED will flash green to confirm pairing.
